title.en: And the Nine Ancestors are the ones who must be...

content.en:
With the guarantee of Feng Ming's original ancestor, Ye Tian would dare to kill the holy sons of the Nine Lights Holy Gate, as long as it was not too excessive, there would be no big problem.

And the Nine Ancestors are the ones who must be killed.

The supreme treasure.

While Ye Tian was collecting resources, he was looking for the original ancestor of the Nine Lights Holy Gate.

Soon, a Triple Origin Ancestor of the True Inheritance Disciple level was sensed by Ye Tian and killed the other party in seconds with a Void Blade in his hand, and then collected the resources on his body and left.

As time passed, a true disciple and holy son named the Nine Lights Holy Gate was found by Ye Tian and killed them one by one.

Such a move made the Nine Light Holy Gate completely angry, but they were also afraid of Ye Tian!

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

The Dawn Holy Ancestor called an incarnation left behind by the Nine Primordial Ancestors to him.

The avatar has no strength, and after the distance is very long, it can only be forcibly maintained in a special way, and it cannot be used in battle at all, and it even takes a long time to contact the main body.

The Nine Ancestors are the descendants of the Dawn Holy Ancestor, and they are also the strongest Triple Origin Ancestor Holy Son of the Nine Light Holy Gate's generation.

"Master!"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors came to the Dawn Holy Ancestor and said respectfully.

"Nine Venerables, you have met the Endless Ancestor of the Nine Lights Holy Gate, don't fight each other!" said the Dawn Saint Ancestor.

"Why?" the Nine Primordial Ancestors wondered, "Endless Primordial Ancestor killed Yunhan Primordial Ancestor, this can only mean that Yunhan Primordial Ancestor is too weak, and may be careless." And it's not difficult for me to kill the Yunhan Ancestor, not necessarily weaker than the Endless Ancestor. Moreover, I am the deity entering, and I can use one kind of holy art without restrictions, while the clones of other holy sons can't use holy arts a few times, and they can't last long in battle. If the Endless Ancestor dares to come to me for trouble, I will directly kill his clone. "

"It's not worth it!" "Dawn Origin Ancestor sighed: "You are the deity, if you fall, then you will really fall, and the Endless Origin Ancestor is different, he is a clone, and if he dies, he will lose this opportunity, but the impact is not great, and the future potential is still very high." It's not worth it for you to fight the Endless Ancestors!"

"Master, don't worry, my physique is special, and my cultivation Dao is special, even the top Quadruple Origin Ancestor will be difficult to kill me, and the Endless Origin Ancestor will not be able to kill me at all!"

"This is an order! With our relationship with the Void Fang Holy Gate, the Void Fang Holy Gate will definitely let the Endless Origin Ancestor deal with you, they don't like to see you rise. You are only a Triple Origin Ancestor now, and your physique and cultivation Dao have reached the Fifth Origin Ancestor, and you can really be regarded as rising, and at that time, a bunch of Five Origin Ancestors can't surround and kill you. You are far more important to our Nine Lights Holy Gate than a Fivefold Ancestor. Dawn Ancestor ordered.

"Yes, Master!"

The Nine Ancestors replied.

Subsequently, the Nine Ancestors left.

After the Nine Primordial Ancestors left, the Dawn Saint Ancestor took out a cloud of black light.

It was a treasure he had obtained from a treasure in the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and few people knew what it was, but he did.

"Eternal Ancestor, one of the best treasures to assist in breaking through the half-step sixfold original ancestor, with it, I have a fifty percent hope of stepping into the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor realm. It's a pity that refining it is too time-consuming, but it doesn't matter, one day, I can refine it and thus step into the half-step sixfold realm. At that time, I will be able to rank at the peak level of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and with my disciple stepping into the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, my combat power will be almost invincible at the same level. My vein is absolutely comparable to the main vein in the Nine Lights Holy Gate. As for the Void Tooth Holy Gate, hehe, it will definitely be frantically suppressed by our Nine Light Holy Gate. "Dawn Holy Ancestor said secretly.

......

"The Supreme Treasure Land!"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors obtained information from the avatars.

"Master asked me to avoid the Endless Ancestor, hehe, I will be afraid of him?"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors said coldly.

If he can't meet it, it's fine, if he does, he must kill Ye Tian to prove that he is stronger.

And so it passed for another time.

Ye Tian found some Taishi Golden Liquid during the period, plus he killed some Holy Sons of the Nine Light Holy Gate, and obtained some Taishi Golden Liquid, and his third Natal Primordial Control Technique was about to get the Taishi Golden Liquid he needed.

Finally on this day.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to detect the existence of the Nine Primordial Ancestors.

"Nine Primordial Ancestors, I finally found it, this guy is the first Holy Son of the Nine Light Holy Gate, he was mediocre at first, but after becoming a Triple Ancestor, he rose rapidly, and he could even threaten the Pentfold Ancestor in the future. That's why the Void Fang Gate wanted to kill him. The Nine Lights Holy Gate must have prepared a large number of life-saving things for him, which were very difficult to kill. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, this Nine Primordial Ancestors did not have a resurrection type of Extreme Dao Ancestor on him, so he really killed him if he killed him.

"Don't give this guy any hope of escaping, otherwise my true strength may be exposed, and I will directly go all out to kill him instantly, so that his avatar will not have time to notify anyone. "

Ye Tian muttered.

......

"How can I feel palpitations?"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors frowned.

He probed and found nothing.

Later, he deduced it again, but he didn't find anything.

Abrupt.

A golden light came across time and space, and the speed was too fast.

"This ......"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors were dumbfounded, what level of attack is this, it's too terrifying!

In an instant, life-saving things appeared on his body.

However, under this golden light, many treasures were shattered in an instant, and they couldn't be stopped at all.

This is Ye Tian's supreme primordial control technique, Endless Golden Light, how terrifying its attack power is.

"Pagoda of Will!"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors directly urged the Will Pagoda.

One hundred and eighty-six layers of the Will Pagoda appeared, of which only one hundred and thirteen layers of the Will Pagoda were engraved with the Extreme Path, which was also his limit.

However.

The Pagoda of Will also cracked, and it couldn't stop the blow at all.

Poof!

The endless golden light tore through all defenses, and finally slammed into one of the Nine Ancestors' defensive holy arts, the Nine Dragons Shield, which was even better than the glazed holy cover.

If it weren't for the full support of the Nine Light Holy Gate, it would be impossible for him to practice this holy art, and the treasures and costs he needed to pay were too great!

However.

The Nine Dragons shield couldn't withstand Ye Tian's endless golden light, and it was pierced by a single blow.

Then, the primordial phoenix immortal body of the nine original ancestors played its final importance, and although it was still pierced, it retained the hope of life.

The Nine Primordial Ancestors didn't dare to fight Ye Tian, so they urged another life-saving thing, making their speed exceed the limit by dozens of times, and wanted to escape.

However.

Ye Tian exerted his endless speed, and he leaped over in an instant, surpassing the speed of the Nine Primordial Ancestors.

"Endless Ancestor!"

At this moment, the Nine Primordial Ancestors finally recognized Ye Tian.

He never expected Ye Tian's strength to be so terrifying, why the hell is still a triple ancestor, and the top quadruple ancestor is not so powerful.

"Give me death!"

The Nine Primordial Ancestors burst out a hole card left to him by the Dawn Ancestor, a pure explosive attack-type treasure, releasing a black light that hit Ye Tian.

However, when it hit Ye Tian's endless light mask, it only set off a ripple.

Then.

Ye Tian made a move from then on, casting endless golden light, covering the nine original ancestors.

This time, all the means of the Nine Ancestors could not be carried anymore, and they were directly killed.

"It's not bad, you even want me to shoot twice!"

Ye Tian had to admit that this Nine Primordial Ancestors were indeed very powerful, and their life-saving ability was very strong.

But it's a pity to meet him!
